title: Verify existing implementation of request timing middleware
description: The request timing middleware already exists at `src/middleware/request-timing.ts` with `X-Response-Time` header support, configurable header name, and path exclusion. Tests exist at `src/middleware/request-timing.test.ts` with 9 test cases covering header addition, custom headers, excluded paths, and configuration options.
existing_patterns: src/middleware/request-logger.ts - Express-style middleware chain pattern with config object, excluded paths via Set, NextResponse.next() for passthrough
